message:
docs(agent_config): clarify filename field description for global scope

Update the doc-comments on AgentConfigureResultItem.filename and
AgentConfigurePlanItem.filename to note that global-scope paths are
absolute only when the detected root can be resolved.  Align the
corresponding JSON schema descriptions in both wa-robot-agents-configure
and wa-robot-agents-configure-dry-run to match.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
